title: podman compose on windows doesn't use VPN's DNS server
body:
### Issue Description

connected to office VPN. can't compose pull an image from a server in the office.

can ping the machine from windows
can ping the machine from default wsl2 instance.
can 'docker compose pull' the image fine via Docker Desktop.

CAN'T 'podman compose pull' the image using podman.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

```
winget install podman
podman machine init
podman machine set --rootful
podman machine start
```
```
> podman compose pull host.vpn.company.com/images/image-v1
>>>> Executing external compose provider "C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\resources\\bin\\docker-compose.exe". Please see podman-compose(1) for how to disable this message. <<<<

time="2025-06-04T17:07:22-07:00" level=warning msg="The \"CONTAINER_HOST\" variable is not set. Defaulting to a blank string."
no such service: host.vpn.company.com/images/image-v1
Error: executing C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin\docker-compose.exe pull host.vpn.company.com/images/image-v1: exit status 1
```


this interface list is incomplete:
```
>wsl -d podman-machine-default ip a
1: lo: <LOOPBACK,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 65536 qdisc noqueue state UNKNOWN group default qlen 1000
    link/loopback 00:00:00:00:00:00 brd 00:00:00:00:00:00
    inet 127.0.0.1/8 scope host lo
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
    inet6 ::1/128 scope host proto kernel_lo
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
2: eth0: <BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 1500 qdisc mq state UP group default qlen 1000
    link/ether 00:15:5d:75:7e:bb brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff
    inet 172.30.88.90/20 brd 172.30.95.255 scope global eth0
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
    inet6 fe80::215:5dff:fe75:7ebb/64 scope link proto kernel_ll
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
```

this nameserver list is incomplete:
```
>wsl -d podman-machine-default cat /etc/resolv.conf
# This file was automatically generated by WSL. To stop automatic generation of this file, add the following entry to /etc/wsl.conf:
# [network]
# generateResolvConf = false
nameserver 10.0.3.1
```

weirdly, though, those two last ones are identical to the `docker-desktop` wsl2 instance. however `docker compose` works fine (when running Docker Desktop).

### Describe the results you received

-

### Describe the results you expected

-

comments.body:
@Spongman could you please include more info about the Windows version as well?

@l0rd PTAL. maybe this should be moved to podman-compose?

A reviewer has determined we need more information to understand the reported issue.  A comment on what is missing should be provided. Be certain you:

* provide an exact reproducer where possible
* verify you have provided all relevant information - minimum is `podman info`
* answer any follow up questions

If no response to the `needs-info` is provided in 30 days, this issue may be closed by our stale bot.

For more information on reporting issues on this repository, consult our [issue guide](ISSUE.md).

```
>wsl --version
WSL version: 2.5.7.0
Kernel version: 6.6.87.1-1
WSLg version: 1.0.66
MSRDC version: 1.2.6074
Direct3D version: 1.611.1-81528511
DXCore version: 10.0.26100.1-240331-1435.ge-release
Windows version: 10.0.19045.5854
```
you should add this to `podman info`

two of my windows network interfaces have DNS servers configured:
- the default ethernet connection
- the openconnect VPN connection (to PA GlobalProtect)
@Spongman do other podman actions work properly? For example, a `podman pull` ?
also, try the `pull` from windows and then do a `podman machine ssh` and try again.

no. `podman machine pull` doesn't work from windows or ssh. same error.

it was never going to work from ssh: as i described above the wsl2 instance doesn't have an interface matching the windows VPN interface, and it doesn't have the VPN's DNS resolver in its resolv.conf - it _only_ has the `172.30/20` interface and the DNS for my intenet-facing nic.

i'm guessing this is something that Docker's vpnkit does...
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
